InstSimplify didn't simplify it earlier for this vector case, so hitting llvm_unreachable aborts. To prevent the crash, I will replace those llvm_unreachable calls with a graceful fallback returning nullptr, which tells InstCombine to skip this canonicalization rather than aborting.

```bash
sed -i '7182s/llvm_unreachable([^)]*);/return nullptr;/' llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp && sed -i '7191s/llvm_unreachable([^)]*);/return nullptr;/' llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp && submit-patch
```
